title: EMR App

title: Tip Calculator
description: Interactive tip calculator application built with React. Features bill splitting, custom tip percentages, and responsive design for easy dining calculations.

description: A collaborative task management platform with real-time updates, team collaboration features, project tracking, and intuitive dashboard interface.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Personal developer portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and experience. Built with modern React, featuring smooth animations, responsive design, and contact integration.
